tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config system interface
edit port2
set src-check enable
set allowaccess ping https ssh http
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
set name "block-icmp-out"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "LAN_net"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
end

show system interface port2
show firewall policy 1
show firewall policy
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config system interface

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (interface) # edit port2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (port2) # set src-check enable

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (port2) # set allowaccess ping https ssh http

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (port2) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (interface) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 1

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set name "block-icmp-out"
'block-icmp-out' is already used by firewall.policy '2'
node_check_object fail! for name block-icmp-out

value parse error before 'block-icmp-out'
Command fail. Return code -651

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set srcaddr "LAN_net"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set service "PING"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # set logtraffic all

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (1) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show system interface port2
config system interface
    edit "port2"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set device-identification enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set role lan
        set snmp-index 2
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy 1
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid a52a0f56-1612-51f1-3f57-09d06c065067
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "LAN_net"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid a52a0f56-1612-51f1-3f57-09d06c065067
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "LAN_net"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 2
        set name "block-icmp-out"
        set uuid e79ed0b8-1e3e-51f1-b45f-845a1066ede6
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "LAN_net"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
